text.content:
=== REVENUE ARCHITECTURE FRAMEWORK ===
My approach: People + Process + Systems + Philosophy. Not dashboards.

**Problems I'll solve:** Multi-region fragmentation, HubSpot at scale, 100+ org process drift.

**Q1: 100+ GTM experience**
At Penbrothers: rebuilt end-to-end GTM, 3x revenue in 12 months. AI-automated outbound, territories from scratch, forecasting model from hope to math. Built coaching culture — reps knew numbers, knew gap, knew next step. No heroics.

Also mentored 250+ startups through 500 Startups. Every SaaS struggles with: pipeline mystery, CRM decay, forecast fantasy. Solved all three.

**Q2: HubSpot**
Implemented from ground up at Penbrothers. Automated sequences 3x industry avg. Lead scoring, pipeline automation, CRM hygiene as non-negotiable. Philosophy: CRM is a mirror, not magic. Fix foundation first.

**Q3: Forecasting**
Commit-Expected-Best model. Build into HubSpot with custom fields. Weekly we know the number — not $50K-$500K range. Drove 3x growth at Penbrothers.

**Q4: Why Eftsure?**
1) $5T fraud problem that matters. 2) Regional to global inflection = exact architecture challenge I love. Based Tokyo, time zones OK.

**Q5-7:** Market rate salary, 2 weeks notice, Portuguese citizen based Tokyo.

**AUTOMATION IDEAS:**
1. Multi-Region Lead Routing (HubSpot workflow, 2-4hrs)
2. CRM Hygiene Suite (data quality scorecard, 3-5hrs)
3. Cross-Region Forecasting Dashboard (4-6hrs)

Full version: applications/eftsure-head-revops.md
